---
name: Problem / Bug
about: Something isn't working as described, or you ran into trouble while building
title: "[PROBLEM] "
labels: problem
---

**What were you trying to build or do?**
Which part of the project is this about (base, batten mount, pattern, etc.)?

**What happened?**
What didn't work? A photo or video helps a lot, if you have one.

**What did you expect?**
If it's clear from the docs — what should have happened instead?

**Materials / setup**
What materials did you use (if different from the docs)? What tools?

**Anything else**
Anything else that might be useful context.
